title: Responsible Data Management Research
description: Analyzed American Community Survey data (1.6M+ observations) using Python to identify patterns across demographic and occupational variables, uncovering a 29% income disparity across occupation codes.

title: XGBoost Health Classifier
description: Engineered and optimized an XGBoost classifier using hyperparameter tuning and Repeated Stratified K-Fold cross-validation, achieving 96% cross-validated accuracy on CDC NHANES dataset.
